    AllReportsController - Class in com.boba
    This class contains all of the logic for the manager to be able to generate reports.
    AllReportsController() - Constructor for class com.boba.AllReportsController
    This class does not have a constructor.
    AllReportsController.ProductUsageRow - Class in com.boba
    This is a nested class within the AllReportsController for each row in the Product Usage Table.

    This is a nested class within the AllReportsController.
    AllReportsController.XReportRow - Class in com.boba
    This is a nested class within the AllReportsController.
    AllReportsController.ZReportRow - Class in com.boba
    This is a nested class within the AllReportsController.
